path_classes.description: canonical path with verified-truth evidence and full safeguards
alternate canonical path also verified-truth (e.g. role-specific)
safety-only path under emergency operational mode
smallest safe path that still asserts validation predicate

rules: preferred > alternative > fallback > degraded > emergency > escalation
verified-truth path beats inferred path of same shape
role-eligible paths beat role-gated paths the user cannot execute
registered fallback beats improvisation (improvisation is forbidden)
irreversible operations always require an explicit administrator-flow path
tie_breakers: shortest declared path among same-class candidates
highest declared maturity level of underlying nodes
fewest unresolved validation findings on the path
